sheets.transform_type: projective, least-squares over the full drawn perimeter
sheets.control_source: 43-course deed traverse, ICP-snapped to the boundary ink
sheets.note: Residual is fit-to-perimeter only. The interior has no independent reference (0 OSM ways enter the property) and is not measured by this number.
